raw_question: 找出2022-2025年第三季度期间，连续四个报告期扣非净利润均超过1亿元的公司，列出股票代码、简称及各报告期的扣非净利润（万元）
raw_question_json: [{"Q":"找出2022-2025年第三季度期间，连续四个报告期扣非净利润均超过1亿元的公司，列出股票代码、简称及各报告期的扣非净利润（万元）"}]

query_plan.question: 找出2022-2025年第三季度期间，连续四个报告期扣非净利润均超过1亿元的公司，列出股票代码、简称及各报告期的扣非净利润（万元）

sql: WITH filtered AS ( SELECT stock_code, stock_abbr, report_period, net_profit_excl_non_recurring FROM financials_view WHERE report_period IN ('2022Q3', '2023Q3', '2024Q3', '2025Q3') AND net_profit_excl_non_recurring > 10000.0), qualified AS ( SELECT stock_code, stock_abbr FROM filtered GROUP BY stock_code, stock_abbr HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT report_period) = 4) SELECT f.stock_code, f.stock_abbr, f.report_period, f.net_profit_excl_non_recurring FROM filtered f JOIN qualified q ON f.stock_code = q.stock_code ORDER BY f.stock_code, f.report_period
sql_history: WITH filtered AS ( SELECT stock_code, stock_abbr, report_period, net_profit_excl_non_recurring FROM financials_view WHERE report_period IN ('2022Q3', '2023Q3', '2024Q3', '2025Q3') AND net_profit_excl_non_recurring > 10000.0), qualified AS ( SELECT stock_code, stock_abbr FROM filtered GROUP BY stock_code, stock_abbr HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT report_period) = 4) SELECT f.stock_code, f.stock_abbr, f.report_period, f.net_profit_excl_non_recurring FROM filtered f JOIN qualified q ON f.stock_code = q.stock_code ORDER BY f.stock_code, f.report_period
